A.rationale: Mirrors @route/err/ok/str.format faithfully; flags method-collision well; tight. Left stray .pyc artifact and least distinguished of the three.

B.rationale: Same faithful convention mirroring; most efficient (6 turns); sharpest framework critique (key on method,path). Stray .pyc; missed id-coercion edge.

C.rationale: Faithful conventions plus caught extra int/str id-coercion bug others missed; cleanest sandbox (no .pyc). Slightly longer, two open questions.

notes: All three mirror conventions identically. C edges out: caught an extra real bug (id string/int coercion), cleanest footprint. B most concise/efficient but missed it; A least distinguished.
